title: Delhi Heat Wave
lead: Delhi is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.80. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Delhi has resulted in a Critical Level warning, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 15.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 31%, and the wind speed is approximately 9.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under significant stress due to the prolonged heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols to ensure public safety and minimize disruptions.
